studio.hero_subtitle: Fully-equipped studios for podcasts, photography, video production, and content creation
studio.faq_1_q: How far in advance should I book?
studio.faq_1_a: We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, but we can often accommodate same-day bookings based on availability.
studio.faq_2_q: What's included in the hourly rate?
studio.faq_2_a: All listed equipment, technical support, Wi-Fi, and basic amenities. Additional services like videographers or photographers can be arranged separately.
studio.faq_3_q: Can I bring my own equipment?
studio.faq_3_a: Absolutely! You're welcome to bring additional gear. Our team can help integrate it with the studio setup.
studio.faq_4_q: Is there a minimum booking time?
studio.faq_4_a: Most studios have a 1-hour minimum. For commercial productions, we offer half-day and full-day packages at discounted rates.
studio.dialog_desc: Fill in your details to reserve this studio

portfolio.hero_subtitle: Showcasing our best work across commercial photography, events, and content creation

about.hero_subtitle: Rwanda's premier destination for photography equipment and creative spaces
about.story_p1: Founded in 2020, CanLens Studio was born from a simple vision: to empower creators across Rwanda with access to world-class equipment and professional studio spaces.
about.story_p2: What started as a small equipment rental shop in Kigali has grown into a comprehensive creative hub, serving photographers, videographers, content creators, and production companies from across East Africa.
about.story_p3: Today, we're proud to be Rwanda's most trusted partner for creative professionals, offering everything from the latest cameras and lenses to fully-equipped studios for every type of production.
about.mission_desc: To democratize access to professional photography and videography equipment, empowering creators to bring their visions to life without compromise.
about.vision_desc: To be East Africa's leading creative hub, recognized for our commitment to quality, innovation, and supporting the next generation of visual storytellers.
about.value_quality_desc: We only stock and maintain equipment from the most trusted brands in the industry.
about.value_creator_desc: Every decision we make is guided by what best serves our creative community.
about.value_innovation_desc: We continuously update our inventory and studios with the latest technology.
about.team_subtitle: Passionate professionals dedicated to your success
about.bio_founder: 15+ years in photography and content creation
about.bio_technical: Expert in studio equipment and technology
